case_title: KOSMAN SUPPLY INC TOM VS SMART PRODUCTS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY KOSMAN SUPPLY INC                       TOM PENDLETON PRESIDENT AS TO DEFENDANT SMART PRODUCTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SMART PRODUCTS INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOSMAN SUPPLY INC                       TOM PENDLETON PRESIDENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMART PRODUCTS INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
